feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: watching life from the passenger's side
entry.summary:
Author: 404_Sky

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,180Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 102

Summary: It sits in his chest growing roots in to muscle and bone and sinew behind his ribs and up his throat. It's lead in his bones and pinpricks on his skin and air trapped in his lungs; oppressive and burdensome and ever present, always present, always always always. Some days he Doesn't Want To Be Here and by some days he means most days but what other choice does he have? It's not like he can just stop. -- Clark Kent is not okay.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Cabin of Shadows
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,288Chapters: 6/9Kudos: 0

Summary: Seven friends. One lake house. A gas station attendant named Mike who looks them all in the eye at the counter and says, without performance or preamble: “You’re going to die up there.” He’s not wrong. Bruce Wayne is not the protagonist of a horror movie. He is the control freak—the one who plans, who catalogues, who watches everyone’s micro-expressions and files them for later. He is also the one who held the soda can at the gas station, felt what it was, and put it down. That single gesture threads through everything that follows. Clark Kent is immune to the fear component of the compound. He is not immune to the other component. This becomes relevant. Repeatedly. A Justice League horror AU in which everyone uses their civilian names, the horror is real, the deaths are earned, and the thing that survives is not what you expect.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Superbat (title pending)
entry.summary:
Author: Xx_princess_xX

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,211Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Bruce Wayne—Gotham's airheaded, billionaire playboy.Batman—Gotham's heroic, brooding genius.No matter the part he played, he was unfazed. Untouchable. Unstoppable.But he was only human, after all.For years, he's pined for two men: Clark Kent and Superman.For years, he's believed they were two separate issues.Until one fateful Justice League meeting, Nightwing discovers his father's workplace crush and Justice League co-worker are the same person.Unfortunately for The Dark Knight, Dick Grayson and Jason Todd are the ones delivering the news.At least, now he had one (extremely embarrassing) problem instead of two... right? aka Nightwing tugged at his suit, attempting to smooth down the awkward creases and folds on the spandex. He had thrown it on in haste because, unbeknownst to Dick, he had a Justice League meeting to attend.“Go.”said Bruce, deadpan.“Why me?”argued Dick, standing there in the middle of the Bat Cave, clutching Zitka to his chest. He was about to have the most epic movie marathon of his life, when a bandaged, tired Dad had called him down.

entry.title: Shadow and Sun
entry.summary:
Author: Katylark

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 160,940Chapters: 16/25Kudos: 24

Summary: When Darkseid’s invasion forces Earth’s heroes to unite, an unknown alien changes the course of the battle—and the world names him Superman. Eighteen months later, Superman is beloved across the globe, distrusted by Batman, and lonelier than anyone knows. Clark Kent has lost both of his parents, built a Fortress in the Arctic, and is quietly coming undone under the weight of grief, secrecy, and the strange Kryptonian bonds that once made his family feel like home. Then he meets Bruce Wayne. What begins across the waters between Metropolis and Gotham as an unexpected romance becomes something deeper, more dangerous, and far more fragile than either of them is prepared for—especially when Clark’s last surviving family falls from the stars, Lex Luthor starts asking all the right questions, and Bruce mistakes the truth for betrayal. A story about first trust, second chances, alien invasions, black sites, the family you lose, and the family you choose.

entry.title: Hereafter, Therebefore
entry.summary:
Author: TransBuckaroo

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,012Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 27

Summary: Jason Todd-Wayne finds his way home to Wayne Manor deep into the night in the first week of December. The first true snow of the season has begun, flakes clinging to his hair and packing into the tread of his boots. His ragged, labored breaths are visible in the air, puffs lit up by the street lamps he passes by. He stumbles not unlike a newborn deer up the staircase leading to the manor. Tripping a few times, catching himself on the steps with the hand not clutching desperately to his ribs, pain sparking white-hot and furious. The cold breeze stings at his eyes, forcing him to squint against the chill. Jason’s hand fumbled to slap his palm against the doors and the call button, making a feeble attempt to call out to someone – anyone – that might answer him from inside. OR Jason Todd-Wayne escapes captivity on his own. His family does what families do.

entry.title: New World Order
entry.summary:
Author: MalloryB

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,623Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 96

Summary: Superman’s image has been dragged through the mud beyond repair, and the only people still willing to get dirty defending him are the people of Juhnrpan.And Bruce Wayne, for some reason.Meanwhile, the Batman is increasingly concerned about Superman’s erratic behavior following his involvement in the Juhnrpan vs Boravia conflict and decides the best way to investigate is through Superman’s only known associate: Daily Planet reporter Clark Kent.OrKrypto isn’t captured by Lex Luthor and Clark refuses to turn himself in. That sets off quite the chain reaction.Alternatively titled: How to Become a Dictator in Few Easy Steps! (Plus Superbat identity porn!)

entry.title: your heart, my northern star
entry.summary:
Author: nepobebe

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,431Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 54

Summary: "You want to fuck me," Bruce says, crude. He looks away as Kal's eyes start to widen. "To… to get me pregnant, put your eggs in me. Your robot told me." Sol isn't there to correct him. Bruce doesn't bother with the semantics anyway. It's much too late for that. "It'll fix you," he whispers instead, voice quiet with his lover. "I do…?" Kal asks breathlessly. For some reason, he looks at Bruce as if he has gifted him his soul. As if the declaration only sounds entirely right to him, though Bruce is sure he hadn't even had an inkling of the thought before this moment. He has such a bright look in his eye that Bruce is being burned by it. It's as if, when granted the idea that he and Bruce will start a family, it is the only correct answer in his brain. It makes Bruce pull his hand from Kal's, clinging onto the way his palm cools down as if it's a penance for the half-lie. "Mm." Bruce pauses only for a moment. "I want that. If you're ready." --- Or, Kal-El has imprinted on someone, and will die if he doesn't find a host for his eggs. Bruce won't let that happen no matter the cost.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part Three
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 150,889Chapters: 11/15Kudos: 11

Summary: The Silax treatment is ready, but the cure is no simple rescue. To silence the queen inside him, Aven must let the inhibitor fail, wake the thing Weyland-Yutani built him to carry, and trust Bruce, Clark, Amanda, his brothers, and the children he left behind to keep him alive through the worst of it. For the first time, everyone is in the same room. Secrets come out. Old wounds split open. Family stops being something Aven can protect from a distance and becomes the only reason he can face what comes next. But beyond the Fortress, LexCorp’s stolen files reveal that Weyland’s work has not stopped with Aven. The procedure may end one nightmare. It may also uncover the next. (God, I really suck at summaries lmao)

entry.title: After the Last Heartbeat
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,882Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Alfred Pennyworth woke up dead at 11:34 AM on a Tuesday in October and by midnight had reorganized the suppression rotation, argued protocols with Jason Todd, held Thomas Wayne for the first time in forty years, and filed a math anomaly in the Naldoreth accounting under investigation required. After the Last Heartbeat is the fourth part of The House We Never Leave. It is the one where the dead side gets its full complement, where Alfred and Jason discover what Naldoreth actually is and what fixing it will require, where Bruce and Clark search the archives and all the lights go out and the crowd comes to the windows singing in Yoruba and Bantu and Swahili and Xhosa and doesn't leave at dawn, where Clark makes his decision about his door, and where Alfred learns fourteen names with hundreds still to go. The accounting has begun. It will take years. They are doing it anyway.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Let Me Light That For You, Baby
entry.summary:
Author: KittySweetwater

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 293Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: Bruce know he won't make it this time, why should it matter anymore

entry.title: sweet baby
entry.summary:
Author: Jja_Jjazza

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,640Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 74

Summary: The screen is still loading the second counterpart – the second contributor to the baby’s creation. “It must be Luthor,” Bruce says. “He’s the only one stupid enough to–” The screen loads. A match is confirmed. An image flickers up. “Oh, shit,” Tim gasps. Clark Kent, one side reads in big, bold letters, and beneath it shows Clark’s latest press profile photo. And on the other… Bruce Wayne. The image for Bruce is from a red carpet event. It’s flattering, boasting all his best features, from his thick, sharp eyebrows to the soft pink of his lips. - (Babies aren't always predicted. Sometimes they come as a surprise.)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent
  • Bruce Wayne
  • Original Child Character(s)

  • Pre-Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Mutual Pining

entry.title: To be someone else
entry.summary:
Author: capricious_Bastard

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,434Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: What if... He doesn't die; he does call; tomorrow brings the sun and him with it?
